Localization.Description: A connection was allowed or blocked

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Allowed connection from address {src.mac} to address {dst.mac} on host {event_src.host}
Blocked connection from address {src.mac} to address {dst.mac} on host {event_src.host}
Allowed connection via the {protocol} protocol from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} on host {event_src.host}
Blocked connection via the {protocol} protocol from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} on host {event_src.host}
Allowed connection via the {protocol} protocol from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} on host {event_src.host}
Blocked connection via the {protocol} protocol from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} on host {event_src.host}
